The '''OX9''' was a model of [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. It was essentially humanoid in shape, short, stocky, with large plate-like hand appendages to facilitate carrying large loads. They were also capable of constructing various buildings. They had elongated heads, were the same beige color as [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s, and spoke in warbling [[Binary|droidspeak]]. OX9 droids were produced at [[command center]]s.

==Behind the scenes==
The OX9 first appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and in its [[2002]] expansion pack, ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''. They cost 50 units of food.
